Part.Source:
Event Start
Do "InitAuthenticationOauth20" If &Mode = TrnMode.Display or &Mode = TrnMode.Delete If &Mode = TrnMode.Display BtnEnter.Visible = False Endif &FunctionId.Enabled = False &IsEnable.Enabled = False &Dsc.Enabled = False &SmallImageName.Enabled = False &BigImageName.Enabled = False &Impersonate.Enabled = False BtnEnter.Caption = "WWP_GAM_Delete" BtnAdd.Visible = False &Name.Enabled = False &IsEnable.Enabled = False &Dsc.Enabled = False &SmallImageName.Enabled = False &BigImageName.Enabled = False &Impersonate.Enabled = False &Oauth20ClientIdTag.Enabled = False &Oauth20ClientIdValue.Enabled = False &Oauth20ClientSecretTag.Enabled = False &Oauth20ClientSecretValue.Enabled = False &Oauth20RedirectURLTag.Enabled = False &Oauth20RedirectURLValue.Enabled = False &Oauth20RedirectURLisCustom.Enabled = False &Oauth20RedirectToAuthenticate.Enabled = False &AuthorizeURL.Enabled = False &AuthRespTypeInclude.Enabled = False &AuthRespTypeTag.Enabled = False &AuthRespTypeValue.Enabled = False &AuthScopeInclude.Enabled = False &AuthScopeTag.Enabled = False &AuthScopeValue.Enabled = False &AuthStateInclude.Enabled = False &AuthStateTag.Enabled = False &AuthClientIdInclude.Enabled = False &AuthClientSecretInclude.Enabled = False &AuthRedirURLInclude.Enabled = False &AuthAdditionalParameters.Enabled = False &AuthAdditionalParametersSD.Enabled = False &AuthResponseAccessCodeTag.Enabled = False &AuthResponseErrorDescTag.Enabled = False &TokenURL.Enabled = False &TokenMethod.Enabled = False &TokenHeaderKeyTag.Enabled = False &TokenHeaderKeyValue.Enabled = False &TokenHeaderAuthorizationBasicInclude.Enabled = False &TokenGrantTypeInclude.Enabled = False &TokenGrantTypeTag.Enabled = False &TokenGrantTypeValue.Enabled = False &TokenAccessCodeInclude.Enabled = False &TokenCliIdInclude.Enabled = False &TokenCliSecretInclude.Enabled = False &TokenRedirectURLInclude.Enabled = False &TokenAdditionalParameters.Enabled = False &TokenResponseAccessTokenTag.Enabled = False &TokenResponseTokenTypeTag.Enabled = False &TokenResponseExpiresInTag.Enabled = False &TokenResponseScopeTag.Enabled = False &TokenResponseUserIdTag.Enabled = False &TokenResponseRefreshTokenTag.Enabled = False &TokenResponseErrorDescriptionTag.Enabled = False &AutovalidateExternalTokenAndRefresh.Enabled = False &TokenRefreshTokenURL.Enabled = False &UserInfoURL.Enabled = False &UserInfoMethod.Enabled = False &UserInfoHeaderKeyTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoHeaderKeyValue.Enabled = False &UserInfoAccessTokenInclude.Enabled = False &UserInfoAccessTokenName.Enabled = False &UserInfoClientIdInclude.Enabled = False &UserInfoClientIdName.Enabled = False &UserInfoClientSecretInclude.Enabled = False &UserInfoClientSecretName.Enabled = False &UserInfoUserIdInclude.Enabled = False &UserInfoAdditionalParameters.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserEmailTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserVerifiedEmailTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserExternalIdTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserNameTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserFirstNameTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserLastNameGenAuto.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserLastNameTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserGenderTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserGenderValues.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserBirthdayTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserURLImageTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserURLProfileTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserLanguageTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseUserTimeZoneTag.Enabled = False &UserInfoResponseErrorDescriptionTag.Enabled = False
Else If &Mode = TrnMode.Insert &Name.Enabled = True Else &Name.Enabled = False EndIf Endif
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' Grid.Rows = Page.Rows
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Grid.Load
For &GAMPropertySimple in &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserProperties &DeleteProperty.FromImage(ActionCancel) &DynamicPropName = &GAMPropertySimple.Id &DynamicPropTag = &GAMPropertySimple.Value If &Mode = TrnMode.Display or &Mode = TrnMode.Delete &DeleteProperty.Visible = false &DynamicPropName.Enabled = false &DynamicPropTag.Enabled = false EndIf load EndFor
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &DeleteProperty.FromImage(ActionDelete) &DeleteProperty.TooltipText = ""
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoAdd'
&DeleteProperty.FromImage(ActionCancel) &DeleteProperty.Visible = true &DynamicPropName.Enabled = true &DynamicPropName.Visible = true &DynamicPropTag.Enabled = true &DynamicPropTag.Visible = true load
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'CheckRequiredFields'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&CheckRequiredFieldsResult = True If &Name.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','WWP_GAM_Name'), DVMessageType.error, &Name.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If Not (not &UserInfoResponseUserLastNameGenAuto) &UserInfoResponseUserLastNameTag.Visible = False UserInfoResponseUserLastNameTag_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' TextBlockUserInfoResponseUserLastNameTag_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &UserInfoResponseUserLastNameTag.Visible = True UserInfoResponseUserLastNameTag_Cell.Class = !'MergeDataCell' TextBlockUserInfoResponseUserLastNameTag_Cell.Class = !'col-sm-3 MergeLabelCell' EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Event Enter
Do 'CheckRequiredFields' If &CheckRequiredFieldsResult Do Case Case &Mode = TrnMode.Insert or &Mode = TrnMode.Update Do "SaveAuthenticationOauth20" Case &Mode = TrnMode.Delete &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Load(&Name) &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Delete() EndCase
If &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Success() Commit GAMWWAuthTypes() Else &Errors = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.GetErrors() For &Error in &Errors Msg(Format(!"%1 (GAM%2)", &Error.Message, &Error.Code)) EndFor EndIf EndIf
EndEvent
Event &UserInfoResponseUserLastNameGenAuto.Click
Do 'UserInfoLastNameFieldTag'
EndEvent
Event &DeleteProperty.Click
&DeleteProperty.FromImage(ActionCancel) &DeleteProperty.Visible = false &DynamicPropName.Visible = false &DynamicPropTag.Visible = false &DynamicPropName.SetEmpty() &DynamicPropTag.SetEmpty() &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Name = &Name &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.RemoveUserInfoProperty(&DynamicPropName,&Errors)
EndEvent
Sub "InitAuthenticationOauth20"
&AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Load(&Name) &Name = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Name &IsEnable = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.IsEnable &Dsc = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Description &SmallImageName = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.SmallImageName &BigImageName = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.BigImageName &Impersonate = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Impersonate &Oauth20ClientIdTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.ClientId_Name &Oauth20ClientIdValue = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.ClientId_Value &Oauth20ClientSecretTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.ClientSecret_Name &Oauth20ClientSecretValue = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.ClientSecret_Value &Oauth20RedirectURLTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.RedirectURL_Name &Oauth20RedirectURLValue = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.RedirectURL_Value &Oauth20RedirectURLisCustom = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.RedirectURL_isCustom &Oauth20RedirectToAuthenticate = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.RedirectToAuthenticate
&AuthorizeURL = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.URL &AuthRespTypeInclude = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.ResponseType_Include &AuthRespTypeTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.ResponseType_Name &AuthRespTypeValue = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.ResponseType_Value &AuthScopeInclude = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.Scope_Include &AuthScopeTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.Scope_Name &AuthScopeValue = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.Scope_Value &AuthStateInclude = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.State_Include &AuthStateTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.State_Name &AuthClientIdInclude = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.ClientId_Include &AuthClientSecretInclude = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.ClientSecret_Include &AuthRedirURLInclude = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.RedirectURL_Include &AuthAdditionalParameters = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.AdditionalParameters &AuthAdditionalParametersSD = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.AdditionalParametersNativeSD &AuthResponseAccessCodeTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.ResponseAccessCode_Name &AuthResponseErrorDescTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.ResponseErrorDescription_Name
&TokenURL = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.URL &TokenMethod = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.Method &TokenHeaderKeyTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.Header_Key &TokenHeaderKeyValue = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.Header_Value &TokenHeaderAuthenticationInclude = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.Header_Authentication_Include &TokenHeaderAuthenticationMethod = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.Header_Authentication_Method &TokenHeaderAuthenticationRealm = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.Header_Authentication_Realm &TokenHeaderAuthorizationBasicInclude = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.Header_AuthorizationBasic_Include &TokenGrantTypeInclude = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.GrantType_Include &TokenGrantTypeTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.GrantType_Name &TokenGrantTypeValue = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.GrantType_Value &TokenAccessCodeInclude = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.AccessCode_Include &TokenCliIdInclude = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.ClientId_Include &TokenCliSecretInclude = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.ClientSecret_Include &TokenRedirectURLInclude = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.RedirectURL_Include &TokenAdditionalParameters = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.AdditionalParameters &TokenResponseAccessTokenTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.ResponseAccessToken_Name &TokenResponseTokenTypeTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.ResponseTokenType_Name &TokenResponseExpiresInTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.ResponseExpiresIn_Name &TokenResponseScopeTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.ResponseScope_Name &TokenResponseUserIdTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.ResponseUserId_Name &TokenResponseRefreshTokenTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.ResponseRefreshToken_Name &TokenResponseErrorDescriptionTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.ResponseErrorDescription_Name
&AutovalidateExternalTokenAndRefresh = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.AutovalidateExternalTokenAndRefresh &TokenRefreshTokenURL = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.RefreshToken_URL
&UserInfoURL = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.URL &UserInfoMethod = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.Method &UserInfoHeaderKeyTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.Header_Key &UserInfoHeaderKeyValue = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.Header_Value &UserInfoAccessTokenInclude = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.AccessToken_Include &UserInfoAccessTokenName = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.AccessToken_Name &UserInfoClientIdInclude = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ClientId_Include &UserInfoClientIdName = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ClientId_Name &UserInfoClientSecretInclude = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ClientSecret_Include &UserInfoClientSecretName = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ClientSecret_Name &UserInfoUserIdInclude = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.UserId_Include &UserInfoAdditionalParameters = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.AdditionalParameters &UserInfoResponseUserEmailTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserEmail_Name &UserInfoResponseUserVerifiedEmailTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserVerifiedEmail_Name &UserInfoResponseUserExternalIdTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserExternalId_Name &UserInfoResponseUserNameTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserName_Name &UserInfoResponseUserFirstNameTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserFirstName_Name &UserInfoResponseUserLastNameGenAuto = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserLastName_GenerateAutomatic &UserInfoResponseUserLastNameTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserLastName_Name &UserInfoResponseUserGenderTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserGender_Name &UserInfoResponseUserGenderValues = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserGender_Values &UserInfoResponseUserBirthdayTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserBirthday_Name &UserInfoResponseUserURLImageTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserURLImage_Name &UserInfoResponseUserURLProfileTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserURLProfile_Name &UserInfoResponseUserLanguageTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserLanguage_Name &UserInfoResponseUserTimeZoneTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserTimeZone_Name &UserInfoResponseErrorDescriptionTag = &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseErrorDescription_Name &FunctionId = GAMAuthenticationFunctions.OnlyAuthentication &FunctionId.Enabled = False Do 'UserInfoLastNameFieldTag' If &Mode = TrnMode.Insert &AuthenticationTypeOauth20 = new() Endif
EndSub
Sub "SaveAuthenticationOauth20"
&AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Load(&Name) &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Name = &Name &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.IsEnable = &IsEnable &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Description = &Dsc &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.SmallImageName = &SmallImageName &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.BigImageName = &BigImageName &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Impersonate = &Impersonate &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.ClientId_Name = &Oauth20ClientIdTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.ClientId_Value = &Oauth20ClientIdValue &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.ClientSecret_Name = &Oauth20ClientSecretTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.ClientSecret_Value = &Oauth20ClientSecretValue &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.RedirectURL_Name = &Oauth20RedirectURLTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.RedirectURL_Value = &Oauth20RedirectURLValue &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.RedirectURL_isCustom = &Oauth20RedirectURLisCustom &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.RedirectToAuthenticate = &Oauth20RedirectToAuthenticate
&AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.URL = &AuthorizeURL &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.ResponseType_Include = &AuthRespTypeInclude &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.ResponseType_Name = &AuthRespTypeTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.ResponseType_Value = &AuthRespTypeValue &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.Scope_Include = &AuthScopeInclude &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.Scope_Name = &AuthScopeTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.Scope_Value = &AuthScopeValue &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.State_Include = &AuthStateInclude &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.State_Name = &AuthStateTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.ClientId_Include = &AuthClientIdInclude &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.ClientSecret_Include = &AuthClientSecretInclude &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.RedirectURL_Include = &AuthRedirURLInclude &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.AdditionalParameters = &AuthAdditionalParameters &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.AdditionalParametersNativeSD = &AuthAdditionalParametersSD &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.ResponseAccessCode_Name = &AuthResponseAccessCodeTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Authorize.ResponseErrorDescription_Name = &AuthResponseErrorDescTag
&AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.URL = &TokenURL &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.Method.FromString(&TokenMethod) &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.Header_Key = &TokenHeaderKeyTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.Header_Value = &TokenHeaderKeyValue &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.Header_Authentication_Include = &TokenHeaderAuthenticationInclude &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.Header_Authentication_Method = &TokenHeaderAuthenticationMethod &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.Header_Authentication_Realm = &TokenHeaderAuthenticationRealm
&AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.Header_AuthorizationBasic_Include = &TokenHeaderAuthorizationBasicInclude &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.GrantType_Include = &TokenGrantTypeInclude &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.GrantType_Name = &TokenGrantTypeTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.GrantType_Value = &TokenGrantTypeValue &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.AccessCode_Include = &TokenAccessCodeInclude &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.ClientId_Include = &TokenCliIdInclude &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.ClientSecret_Include = &TokenCliSecretInclude &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.RedirectURL_Include = &TokenRedirectURLInclude &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.AdditionalParameters = &TokenAdditionalParameters &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.ResponseAccessToken_Name = &TokenResponseAccessTokenTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.ResponseTokenType_Name = &TokenResponseTokenTypeTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.ResponseExpiresIn_Name = &TokenResponseExpiresInTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.ResponseScope_Name = &TokenResponseScopeTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.ResponseUserId_Name = &TokenResponseUserIdTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.ResponseRefreshToken_Name = &TokenResponseRefreshTokenTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.ResponseErrorDescription_Name = &TokenResponseErrorDescriptionTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.AutovalidateExternalTokenAndRefresh = &AutovalidateExternalTokenAndRefresh &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.Token.RefreshToken_URL = &TokenRefreshTokenURL
&AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.URL = &UserInfoURL &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.Method.FromString(&UserInfoMethod) &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.Header_Key = &UserInfoHeaderKeyTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.Header_Value = &UserInfoHeaderKeyValue &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.AccessToken_Include = &UserInfoAccessTokenInclude &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.AccessToken_Name = &UserInfoAccessTokenName &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ClientId_Include = &UserInfoClientIdInclude &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ClientId_Name = &UserInfoClientIdName &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ClientSecret_Include = &UserInfoClientSecretInclude &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ClientSecret_Name = &UserInfoClientSecretName &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.UserId_Include = &UserInfoUserIdInclude &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.AdditionalParameters = &UserInfoAdditionalParameters &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserEmail_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserEmailTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserVerifiedEmail_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserVerifiedEmailTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserExternalId_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserExternalIdTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserName_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserNameTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserFirstName_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserFirstNameTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserLastName_GenerateAutomatic = &UserInfoResponseUserLastNameGenAuto &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserLastName_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserLastNameTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserGender_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserGenderTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserGender_Values = &UserInfoResponseUserGenderValues &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserBirthday_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserBirthdayTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserURLImage_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserURLImageTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserURLProfile_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserURLProfileTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserLanguage_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserLanguageTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseUserTimeZone_Name = &UserInfoResponseUserTimeZoneTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Oauth20.UserInfo.ResponseErrorDescription_Name = &UserInfoResponseErrorDescriptionTag &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Save()
For each line If not &DynamicPropName.IsEmpty() and not &DynamicPropTag.IsEmpty() &GAMPropertySimple = new() &GAMPropertySimple.Id = &DynamicPropName &GAMPropertySimple.Value = &DynamicPropTag If not &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.SetUserInfoProperty(&GAMPropertySimple, &Errors) For &Error in &Errors Msg(Format(!"%1 (GAM%2)", &Error.Message, &Error.Code),status) EndFor EndIf EndIf EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'UserInfoLastNameFieldTag'
If &UserInfoResponseUserLastNameGenAuto &UserInfoResponseUserLastNameTag.Visible = False TBUserLastNameHelp.Caption = !"*Generate Last Name automatically using the first name spaces" Else &UserInfoResponseUserLastNameTag.Visible = True TBUserLastNameHelp.Caption = !"" Endif
EndSub

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Include Authorization header with Basic value?
